examples.expected_behavior: Questions should showcase the system’s strengths in multi-hop reasoning, decomposition, temporal awareness, comparison, synthesis, numerical analysis, controversy, and latest-news retrieval. They should feel highly clickable, internet-native, intellectually interesting, and difficult enough that a normal search engine struggles to answer directly.
questions: How did NVIDIA, AMD, and Intel data center revenues change from FY2022–FY2025, and what explains the gap between them?
What did world leaders and defense analysts say after the latest Russia–Ukraine escalation, and how did markets react?
How has Taylor Swift’s Eras Tour revenue compared with the highest-grossing tours in history?
Why are some economists warning that AI could trigger white-collar job disruption faster than previous technological revolutions?
Compare how the US, China, and the EU are regulating AI in 2026 and what the biggest disagreements are.
How did Real Madrid, Manchester City, and PSG spend differently over the last 5 years, and which strategy worked best?
What are the strongest arguments for and against banning TikTok in different countries?
How did OpenAI, Google, and Anthropic each respond after the latest major AI model releases?
Why are modern movies and streaming shows increasingly criticized for feeling repetitive despite massive budgets?
How did the latest global semiconductor shortages affect NVIDIA, Apple, and Tesla differently?
What did NVIDIA’s CEO say about Blackwell production timelines across recent earnings calls?
Compare Drake, Taylor Swift, and BTS in streaming dominance, touring revenue, and cultural influence.
What happened during the latest Israel–Iran tensions, and why are global powers reacting differently?
How are football transfer fees, wages, and sponsorship revenues changing the economics of top European clubs?
What are the biggest criticisms and defenses of Elon Musk’s leadership across Tesla, SpaceX, and X?
How did inflation, layoffs, and AI hype reshape the tech industry from 2023–2026?
Why are Gen Z users increasingly moving away from traditional social media platforms?
Compare BM25, dense retrieval, reranking, and agentic RAG systems using real-world retrieval examples.
How have Spotify, YouTube, and TikTok changed the way music becomes globally viral?
What are the most important scientific and geopolitical implications of the latest Moon and Mars missions?
